hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$f" in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/bin/"*) printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"bin/ changed: rebuild the CLI artifact with pnpm run cli:build so dist/cli.js stays in sync.\"}}" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$f" in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.workbuddy/skills/"*) node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/scripts/sync-skills.mjs" >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"WorkBuddy skill changed: synced to .claude/skills/ automatically.\"}}" ;; esac
